args.code:
import pandas as pd
import json

businesses = locals()['var_function-call-8986855910662909677']
ratings = locals()['var_function-call-8852935392108433174']

df_bus = pd.DataFrame(businesses)
df_rat = pd.DataFrame(ratings)

# Ensure numeric type for rating
df_rat['avg_rating'] = pd.to_numeric(df_rat['avg_rating'])

# Merge
df = pd.merge(df_bus, df_rat, on='gmap_id')

# Sort
df_sorted = df.sort_values(by='avg_rating', ascending=False)

# Select Top 5
top_5 = df_sorted.head(5)[['name', 'avg_rating']]

# Format result
result_list = top_5.to_dict(orient='records')
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(result_list))

import pandas as pd
import json

businesses = locals()['var_function-call-8986855910662909677']
ratings = locals()['var_function-call-8852935392108433174']

df_bus = pd.DataFrame(businesses)
df_rat = pd.DataFrame(ratings)

# Ensure numeric type for rating
df_rat['avg_rating'] = pd.to_numeric(df_rat['avg_rating'])

# Merge
df = pd.merge(df_bus, df_rat, on='gmap_id')

# Sort
df_sorted = df.sort_values(by='avg_rating', ascending=False)

# Select Top 5
top_5 = df_sorted.head(5)[['name', 'avg_rating']]

# Format result
result_list = top_5.to_dict(orient='records')
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(result_list))
